title: Gendo in Court
wikitext:
[]: Gendo in Court             Quote Post by LordThaeon » Thu Jul 09, 2015 12:10 am Let's say that someone puts Gendo on trial for domestic abuse and parental neglect and Gendo hires you to as his defense lawyer. How would you defend the allegations against Commander Gendo Ikari? 1) Parental Abandonment 2) Emotional and Psychological Manipulation that directly led to... 3) Child endangerment 4) Parental Neglect (towards Shinji and Rei)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 09, 2015 2:03 am I'm pretty sure there was no abandonment committed, at least not in the legal sense. When Shinji stayed with his teacher prior to the first episode, Gendo had probably made some arrangement with the guy to take care of him. This applies to the parental neglect part as well, at least for Shinji. For Rei, he didn't seem very neglective at all, other than leaving her alone in her own apartment, but for the most part Gendo is very attentitive to her. If anything, he should probably be charged for rape when it comes to her case. As for child endangerment, the series addresses that there was really no other choice but to use children to pilot the Eva's, and since humanity'a survival is at stake, Gendo would probably not get charged for it. I cannot think of any overt emotional manipulation of the children by Gendo in the original series; his machinations were geared more toward his war with Seele and arranging the pieces for his vision of Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 09, 2015 3:10 am Sachi wrote: If anything, he should probably be charged for rape when it comes to her case.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jul 09, 2015 3:14 am Sticking his hand in her in EoE ?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jul 09, 2015 3:39 am Seemed pretty consensual until she changed her mind and ate his hand. I'm also not sure how crazy atf mojo would be declared rape in any case... depends how vaguely the statutes are written. Technically Misato is Shinji's legal guardian so if anyone is getting charged with his endangerment it's her, or the teacher who likely had custody until it was transfered to her. Gendo might be on the hook for Rei, but is she legally a child? Her soul is billions of years old afterall, and do you count her body's age as starting when it was first created by the FAR as part of Lilith, when this small chunk of PWM took on this specific shape, when it gained a soul, or by it's apparent biological age, or by the age of it's genetic donor? Also further complications... who has standing to charge Gendo on Rei's behalf in either case when as a created being she might not actually be recognized as a legal person? Does being a ranking officer of a UN special agency give Gendo diplomatic immunity for actions performed in that service?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 09, 2015 3:45 am pwhodges wrote: Sticking his hand in her in EoE ?

Article: Gendo in Court
 ate his hand. I'm also not sure how crazy atf mojo would be declared rape in any case... depends how vaguely the statutes are written. Technically Misato is Shinji's legal guardian so if anyone is getting charged with his endangerment it's her, or the teacher who likely had custody until it was transfered to her. Gendo might be on the hook for Rei, but is she legally a child? Her soul is billions of years old afterall, and do you count her body's age as starting when it was first created by the FAR as part of Lilith, when this small chunk of PWM took on this specific shape, when it gained a soul, or by it's apparent biological age, or by the age of it's genetic donor? Also further complications... who has standing to charge Gendo on Rei's behalf in either case when as a created being she might not actually be recognized as a legal person?
